Specifically, you should gather at least 4 oak planks before trying to craft the crafting table. Additionally, after obtaining the crafting table, use it immediately to craft more oak planks and sticks to avoid running into the step limit. Correctly order your actions by first gathering enough oak logs to make 4 oak planks, then crafting the crafting table, and finally using the crafting table to produce more planks and sticks as needed.
